title: selaginella pallescens
intro: Selaginella pallescens, also known as the pale spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss, a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella pallescens include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and improve respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
